wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Self-Help Book.png}} {{E|Self-Help Book|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} that can occur in any {{2|Acts|Act}}. == Options == {{Frame|Read the Back}} Choose an {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} to {{KW|Enchant|Enchant|2}} with {{KW|Sharp|Sharp|2}} 2.
{{Frame|Read a Random Passage}} Choose a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skill|Skill|2}} to {{KW|Enchant|Enchant|2}} with {{KW|Nimble|Nimble|2}} 2.
{{Frame|Read the Entire Book}} Choose a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Power|2}} to {{KW|Enchant|Enchant|2}} with {{KW|Swift|Swift|2}} 2.
{{Frame|Move On}} Nothing happens. * Options are only available if you have a valid card to apply the enchantment to. Move On is only available if you have no valid cards. == Dialogue ==
On the floor lies a tome, “Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire” The book is {{TS|red||encrusted with blood}} so you find this manuscript highly suspicious. Will you read it?
{{Frame|Read the Back}}
You flip the book over and read the summary:
{{TS|blue||“Critics and Cultists agree that sharp and pointy weapons are the best way to inflict damage!”}} There's a price sticker on the back of the book, crossed out and marked with a greatly reduced price.
{{Frame|Read a Random Passage}}
You flip to a random page:
“Defense 101: Don't get hit!” You read the rest of the passage and it's surprisingly illuminating. You incorporate these ideas into your battle tactics.
{{Frame|Read the Entire Book}}
What an engrossing read! Some choice quotes remain fresh in your mind:
“Avoid big monsters.”
“Take every card.”
“Blocking is for cowards.” Your hands are covered in blood.
{{Frame|Move On}}
You don't particularly care for books, let alone blood-encrusted ones.
